title: references
description: The researcher's curated list of existing docs / rules / guidelines the proposal must build on. An empty list is valid and means no relevant prior art was found.

path.description: Path (relative to the repo root) of the referenced document.

sections.description: The specific section(s) / heading(s) / line range that matter, e.g. "§3.2 Rate limits" or "L40-L62".

rationale.description: One line: why this reference matters for the proposal / what it constrains.
